hooks.command:
printf 'Skippy context is OPT-IN — do not auto-fetch. Use /sync (or the skippy-context MCP) only when Scott says "sync", references a past conversation, or you need cross-project memory.
'; h=$(curl -s --max-time 4 https://omi.fosterlabs.org/health 2>/dev/null || true); if printf '%s' "$h" | grep -q 'phase3-restore+guard'; then printf 'Context Engine: healthy (%s).
' "$(printf '%s' "$h" | tr -d '
' | head -c 200)"; else printf 'Context Engine: health check did not return the expected guard string — retrieval may be down or the docs have drifted. Verify before relying on /sync.
'; fi
